# Vouch Custom Skills

This directory contains reusable workflow skills for Vouch sessions.

## Skills
- vouch-session-bootstrap
- vouch-extension-safety-guard
- vouch-migration-safety
- vouch-third-party-compliance-check

## Intent
These skills are process gates for repeated high-risk workflows and continuity.
The enforcement rules live in .github/copilot-instructions.md.
